name: Metabolic & GLP-1
description: GLP-1 receptor agonists, GIP/glucagon dual and triple agonists, and other metabolic peptides used in weight management, glucose regulation, and metabolic syndrome research.

name: Growth Hormone Secretagogues
description: Growth hormone releasing peptides (GHRPs), growth hormone releasing hormone analogs, and secretagogues that stimulate endogenous GH production.

name: Tissue Repair & Healing
description: Peptides involved in wound healing, tissue regeneration, tendon and ligament repair, and recovery from musculoskeletal injuries.

name: Melanocortin & Sexual Health
description: Melanocortin receptor agonists affecting pigmentation, sexual function, appetite regulation, and inflammatory responses.

name: Neuroprotective & Cognitive
description: Peptides with nootropic, anxiolytic, or neuroprotective properties that support cognitive function, memory, and neuronal health.

name: Cosmetic & Dermal
description: Peptides used in skincare for collagen stimulation, wrinkle reduction, pigmentation control, and dermal matrix support.

name: Immune Modulation
description: Thymic peptides, antimicrobial peptides, and immune regulators that modulate innate and adaptive immune responses.

name: Longevity & Anti-Aging
description: Peptides studied for their potential to influence cellular senescence, telomere maintenance, mitochondrial function, and biological aging.

name: Antimicrobial
description: Host defense peptides and synthetic antimicrobial peptides with activity against bacteria, fungi, and viruses.

name: Sleep & Recovery
description: Peptides that influence circadian rhythm, sleep architecture, and systemic recovery processes.

name: Gastrointestinal
description: Peptides targeting gut barrier integrity, intestinal permeability, and gastrointestinal inflammatory conditions.
